text_block_list.text:
It'd been a little while since I started watching 
over Lucky Lilac's races with Orfevre.
choice_data_list: (I'd better get to work, too)
(I'd better get to work, too)

text_block_list.text:
The notebook I held in my hands was full of my writing. Seeing 
her challenging Orfevre without giving up inspired me… Before 
I knew it, I found myself analyzing their races.
choice_data_list: <size=42>(If she wants Orfe's approval, she needs…)</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……Thank ya… very much. 
I hope… you'll race with me next week.
choice_data_list: (She lost again… But…)

text_block_list.text:
The more I watched her… The more perfect her racing seemed. 
She had the impressive form of a model student, never 
breaking her composure, not even on the track.
choice_data_list: <size=32>(The only thing she could possibly lack is experience.)</size>

text_block_list.text:
The crowd had shrunk over time, but I stayed in the seats,
deep in thought. This race ended with Orfevre breaking
away in the home stretch, like every race before it.
choice_data_list: <size=36>Trying to beat Orfe in the home stretch is just…</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ——It's self-destructive, ain't it?
choice_data_list: …L-Lucky Lilac!?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Just Lala's fine. That's what everyone calls me. Say, 
that notebook ya got there… Why, I figured there was 
someone watchin' me closely, but my goodness…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… Ya got times, strategies, and everything else in here. 
And your analysis is incredibly detailed, too. 
…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: "How to get Lucky Lilac acknowledged by Orfevre…"
choice_data_list: …After seeing you, I couldn't help myself.
…After seeing you, I couldn't help myself.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…… Trainer, I'm going to the locker room to change. 
…Once I'm back, would ya give me a moment of your time?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
——Orfe-san, she's my… 
My inspiration.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: I used to think racing was just a form of entertainment. Umamusume running, and nothing more than that. But in the midst of that, I saw her running…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
——She stood elegantly, tall and proud. Her every step 
seemed to send a storm of blooming flowers scattering 
beneath her feet. It set my heart aflutter.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
"I want to be a racer like her. An Umamusume who captivates 
everyone… The flower of the flock. The star of the show." 
…Before I knew it, my inspiration became my dream.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……Since then, I devoted myself to training. Eventually I 
reached the point where my teachers all told me I could debut 
whenever I wanted.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
But… A simple debut wouldn't make me the star I wanted 
to be. If I wanted to shine like gold, the way she did… 
…Just being excellent wouldn't be enough.
choice_data_list: And that's why you're racing Orfe?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I want to debut as a racer who was acknowledged by 
Orfe-san. So I asked to race her… and she was kind enough to 
allow it.
choice_data_list: <size=36>(She managed to get THE Tyrant to race her…)</size>

text_block_list.text:
Even someone as domineering as Orfevre was willing to clear 
her weekends to race Lucky Lilac. That fact should've been 
more than enough to prove her high value as a racer.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
At any rate… I haven't the slightest clue what it is that I'm 
missing. But there has to be some way for me to gain her 
approval…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
And to that point, I'd like to ask ya, Trainer. 
Did ya happen to figure anythin' out when ya watched our races?
choice_data_list: Not… not yet. Sorry.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…I see. I appreciate your concern regardless. 
I'll see if I can't come up with somethin' myself.

I couldn't detect a hint of disappointment or worry 
in her smile. Assuming she wasn't just putting up 
a strong face… Her tenacity was unbelievable.
choice_data_list: Why do you push yourself so much?
Why do you push yourself so much?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: …The way I see it, perseverance is beauty. That's why.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Well, if ya do think of something, don't hesitate 
to give me a shout. So long as Orfe-san doesn't give 
up on me, I'll always be there at the track.
choice_data_list: Sure…
Sure…

text_block_list.text:
…I didn't help her in the slightest. If only there was something, 
even something small I could do… I thought long and hard, 
and at the end what I came up with was——
choice_data_list: (Maybe I can help her relax…?)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? 
Do ya have something ya want to tell me?
choice_data_list: I don't… My bed. Snork mimimi.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
choice_data_list: <size=36>My bed? My bad? It's bedtime? G-get it…?</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…… 
Haha. You're quite the cheerful one, ain't ya, Trainer?

Her kind smile made me cringe at myself hard… Even if I 
wanted to help her, I shouldn't have done something I wasn't 
used to.

If I really wanted to help her… There was only one thing I could 
do. And that was to see my work as a trainer through to the end.
choice_data_list: <size=36>…Do you mind if I started watching closer?</size>
<size=36>…Do you mind if I started watching closer?</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…Ya mean… My races with Orfe-san? 
Or are ya talking about me?
choice_data_list: Please, show me how you train.
Please, show me how you train.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: …I suppose you're serious about this.
choice_data_list: I want to find out what you're missing too.
I want to find out what you're missing too.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……I appreciate it. I can't thank ya enough. 
To tell ya the truth, I've been at a loss myself.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to your help, Trainer. 
Let's find what it is I'm missing together.
choice_data_list: I'll do my best. Nice to work with you!
I'll do my best. Nice to work with you!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(Seems like I found myself an unexpected ally. Everyone else 
seems to think gettin' Orfe-san to approve of me's a pipe dream…)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(But that trainer was willin' to help me find a way. 
A new point of view could be just what I needed.)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(…Quite the interesting person, that trainer. 
In more ways than one…)
"I don't… My bed. Snork mimimi."

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…………Because it's bedtime. 
……………

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: WHAT DA HECK WAZZAT!?
